transcript_facts:
- [Assessment] um , beverly's a 24 year old female patient , and i know you have a history of type 2 diabetes and high blood pressure .
- [Assessment] okay , so , that brings me to your diabetes .
- [Assessment] and , and then , um , i know you've had high blood pressure , hypertension .
- [Assessment] so , um , so , my assessment is , is , um , your first problem is diabetes .
- [Assessment] your second problem is your hypertension .
- [Findings] so , you're here today for your yearly exam .
- [Findings] so , how have your blood sugars been ?
- [Findings] how is , how have your blood sugars been ? so , my blood pressure's been good . um , despite my , um , my diabetes levels being up and down .
- [Findings] okay , so , your blood pressures have been normal .
- [Findings] well , let me do a quick physical exam , okay ?
- [Findings] so , on my exam , um , essentially , your exam is normal . you do have that grade 2 , um , systolic ejection fraction back ejection murmur that you , um , that we've heard in the past .
- [Findings] um , pulses are good , so essentially , your exam is , is essentially normal .
- [Findings] hey , dragon , show me the hemoglobin a1c . okay , so , blood sugars have been elevated . your hemoglobin a1c is elevated as well , so that tells me your blood sugars have been a little bit out of control . you're still taking the metformin , correct ?
- [Findings] show me the vital signs . okay , good news here is your blood pressure's good .
- [Findings] we'd like that hemoglobin a1c to be under seven , um , at least .
- [Findings] and , i want you to check your blood sugars in the morning . i want you to call them in in about two weeks so we know what your first , um , fasting blood sugar was in the morning , and then , we'll come back and see you in about two months and see if everything has straightened out .
- [History of Present Illness] no swelling .
- [History of Present Illness] you do n't have any carotid bruits in your neck , no thyromegaly . no edema .
- [History of Present Illness] so , um , uh , i'm not gon na change your medication .
- [History of Present Illness] if it has n't , then we'll talk about adding another medication , okay ?
- [History of Present Illness] i want you to stay on your current medication . you're on li- lisinopril 10 mg once a day . just stay right on that medication .
- [Plan] so , they've been up and down because of my diet , i think , because i've been taking my medication as prescribed .
